endpoints.name: Get Funding Audit Delta
endpoints.description: Get funding audit deltas for a payor
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: V1 List Payment Changes
endpoints.description: Deprecated (use /v4/payments/deltas instead)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Funding
endpoints.description: Get Funding by Id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FUNDINGID}} with a real fundingid.

endpoints.name: Logout
endpoints.description:
Given a valid access token in the header then log out the authenticated user or client

Will revoke the token
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Reset password
endpoints.description:
Reset password

An email with an embedded link will be sent to the receipient of the email address

The link will contain a token to be used for resetting the password
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List Payment Channel Country Rules
endpoints.description: List the country specific payment channel rules.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: V1 Get Fundings for Payor
endpoints.description: Deprecated (use /v4/paymentaudit/fundings)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: V1 Get Payout Statistics
endpoints.description: Deprecated (Use /v4/paymentaudit/payoutStatistics)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Withdraw a Payment
endpoints.description:
withdraw a payment

There are a variety of reasons why this can fail

  • the payment must be in a state of 'accepted' or 'unfunded'
  • the payout must not be in a state of 'instructed'
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYMENTID}} with a real paymentid.

endpoints.name: List Payor Links
endpoints.description: If the payor is set up as part of a hierarchy you can use this API to traverse the hierarchy
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create a Payor Link
endpoints.description: This endpoint allows you to create a payor link.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payor
endpoints.description:
Get a Single Payor by Id.

deprecated since v2.10 - Use /v2/payors
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Create Application
endpoints.description:
Create an application for the given Payor ID.

Applications provide a means to group your API Keys

For example you might have an SAP application that you wish to integrate with Velo

You can create an application and then create one or more API keys for the application
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Create API Key
endpoints.description:
Create an an API key for the given payor Id and application Id

You can create multiple API Keys for a given application

API Keys are programmatic users for integrating your application with the Velo platform
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid. Replace {{APPLICATIONID}} with a real applicationid.

endpoints.name: Get Branding
endpoints.description: Get the payor branding details.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Add Logo
endpoints.description:
Add Payor Logo

Logo file is used in your branding and emails sent to payees
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Reminder Email Opt-Out
endpoints.description:
Update the emailRemindersOptOut field for a Payor. This API can be used to opt out
or opt into Payor Reminder emails. These emails are typically around payee events
such as payees registering and onboarding.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Set notifications
endpoints.description:
Set notifications for a given source account

deprecated since 2.34 (use v3 version)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

endpoints.name: List Supported Countries
endpoints.description:
List the supported countries.

This version will be retired in March 2020. Use /v2/supportedCountries
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: validate
endpoints.description:
The second part of login involves validating using an MFA device

An access token with PRE_AUTH authorities is required
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List the details about the webhooks for the given payor.
endpoints.description: List the details about the webhooks for the given payor.

endpoints.description: Update Webhook
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WEBHOOKID}} with a real webhookid.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/webhooks/{webhookId}/ping
endpoints.description: Trigger an immediate ping notification to the webhook
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WEBHOOKID}} with a real webhookid.

endpoints.name: List Supported Currencies
endpoints.description: List the supported currencies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Funding Accounts
endpoints.description: Get the funding accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Create Funding Account
endpoints.description: Create Funding Account
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Funding Account
endpoints.description: Get Funding Account by ID
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{FUNDINGACCOUNTID}} with a real fundingaccountid.

endpoints.name: Get Payor
endpoints.description: Get a Single Payor by Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Get list of source accounts
endpoints.description: List source accounts.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Source Account
endpoints.description: Get details about given source account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

endpoints.name: Create Funding Request
endpoints.description: Instruct a funding request to transfer funds from the payor’s funding bank to the payor’s balance held within Velo  (202 - accepted, 400 - invalid request body, 404 - source account not found).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

endpoints.name: Transfer Funds between source accounts
endpoints.description: Transfer funds between source accounts for a Payor. The 'from' source account is identified in the URL, and is the account which will be debited. The 'to' (destination) source account is in the body, and is the account which will be credited. Both source accounts must belong to the same Payor. There must be sufficient balance in the 'from' source account, otherwise the transfer attempt will fail.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

endpoints.name: List Supported Countries
endpoints.description: List the supported countries.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List Users
endpoints.description: Get a paginated response listing the Users
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Invite a User
endpoints.description: Create a User and invite them to the system
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Register SMS Number
endpoints.description:
Register an Sms number and send an OTP to it

Used for manual verification of a user

The backoffice user initiates the request to send the OTP to the user's sms

The user then reads back the OTP which the backoffice user enters in the verifactionCode property for requests that require it
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Self
endpoints.description: Get the user's details
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Unregister MFA for Self
endpoints.description:
Unregister the MFA device for the user

If the user does not require further verification then a register new MFA device token will be sent to them via their email address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Update Password for self
endpoints.description: Update password for self
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Validate the proposed password
endpoints.description: validate the password and return a score
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Update User Details for self
endpoints.description:
Update the profile details for the given user

Only Payee user types are supported
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get User
endpoints.description: Get a Single User by Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Delete a User
endpoints.description: Delete User by Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Disable a User
endpoints.description:
If a user is enabled this endpoint will disable them

The invoker must have the appropriate permission

A user cannot disable themself

When a user is disabled any active access tokens will be revoked and the user will not be able to log in
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Enable a User
endpoints.description:
If a user has been disabled this endpoints will enable them

The invoker must have the appropriate permission

A user cannot enable themself

If the user is a payor user and the payor is disabled this operation is not allowed

If enabling a payor user would breach the limit for master admin payor users the request will be rejected
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Unregister MFA for the user
endpoints.description:
Unregister the MFA device for the user

If the user does not require further verification then a register new MFA device token will be sent to them via their email address
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Update User Role
endpoints.description: Update the user's Role
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Resend a token
endpoints.description:
Resend the specified token

The token to resend must already exist for the user

It will be revoked and a new one issued
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Unlock a User
endpoints.description: If a user is locked this endpoint will unlock them
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: Update User Details
endpoints.description:
Update the profile details for the given user

When updating Payor users with the role of payor.master_admin a verificationCode is required
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: List Payees
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Get a paginated response listing the payees for a payor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Query Batch Status
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Fetch the status of a specific batch of payees. The batch is fully processed when status is ACCEPTED and pendingCount is 0 ( 200 - OK, 404 - batch not found ).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BATCHID}} with a real batchid.

endpoints.name: List Payee Changes
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Get a paginated response listing payee changes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payee Invitation Status
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Returns a filtered, paginated list of payees associated with a payor, along with invitation status and grace period end date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Get Payee by Id
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Get Payee by Id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Delete Payee by Id
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

This API will delete Payee by Id (UUID). Deletion by ID is not allowed if:

* Payee ID is not found

* If Payee has not been on-boarded

* If Payee is in grace period

* If Payee has existing payments
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Resend Payee Invite
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Resend an invite to the Payee The payee must have already been invited by the payor and not yet accepted or declined

Any previous invites to the payee by this Payor will be invalidated
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Update Payee Details
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Update payee details for the given Payee Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Update Payee Remote Id
endpoints.description:
Use v4 instead

Update the remote Id for the given Payee Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.description: Deprecated (use /v4/paymentaudit/payments instead)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.description: Deprecated (use /v4/paymentaudit/payments/<paymentId> instead)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYMENTID}} with a real paymentid.

endpoints.name: Submit Payout
endpoints.description:
Create a new payout and return a location header with a link to the payout

Basic validation of the payout is performed before returning but more comprehensive validation is done asynchronously

The results can be obtained by issuing a HTTP GET to the URL returned in the location header

**NOTE:** amount values in payments must be in 'minor units' format. E.g. cents for USD, pence for GBP etc with no decimal places
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payout Summary
endpoints.description: Get payout summary - returns the current state of the payout.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYOUTID}} with a real payoutid.

endpoints.name: Instruct Payout
endpoints.description: Instruct a payout to be made for the specified payoutId.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYOUTID}} with a real payoutid.

endpoints.name: Withdraw Payout
endpoints.description: Withdraw Payout will remove the payout details from the rails but the payout will still be accessible in payout service in WITHDRAWN status.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYOUTID}} with a real payoutid.

endpoints.name: Retrieve payments for a payout
endpoints.description: Retrieve payments for a payout
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYOUTID}} with a real payoutid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYOUTID}} with a real payoutid.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

Set notifications for a given source account

If the balance falls below the amount set in the request an email notification will be sent to the email address registered in the payor profile
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

endpoints.name: Transfer Funds between source accounts
endpoints.description: Transfer funds between source accounts for a Payor. The 'from' source account is identified in the URL, and is the account which will be debited. The 'to' (destination) source account is in the body, and is the account which will be credited. Both source accounts must belong to the same Payor. There must be sufficient balance in the 'from' source account, otherwise the transfer attempt will fail.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SOURCEACCOUNTID}} with a real sourceaccountid.

endpoints.name: List Payees
endpoints.description: Get a paginated response listing the payees for a payor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Query Batch Status
endpoints.description: Fetch the status of a specific batch of payees. The batch is fully processed when status is ACCEPTED and pendingCount is 0 ( 200 - OK, 404 - batch not found ).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BATCHID}} with a real batchid.

endpoints.name: List Payee Changes
endpoints.description:
Get a paginated response listing payee changes (updated since a particular time) to a limited set of fields:
- dbaName
- displayName
- email
- onboardedStatus
- payeeCountry
- payeeId
- remoteId
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payee Invitation Status
endpoints.description: Returns a filtered, paginated list of payees associated with a payor, along with invitation status and grace period end date.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYORID}} with a real payorid.

endpoints.name: Get Payee by Id
endpoints.description: Get Payee by Id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Delete Payee by Id
endpoints.description:
This API will delete Payee by Id (UUID). Deletion by ID is not allowed if:

* Payee ID is not found

* If Payee has not been on-boarded

* If Payee is in grace period

* If Payee has existing payments
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Resend Payee Invite
endpoints.description:
Resend an invite to the Payee The payee must have already been invited by the payor and not yet accepted or declined

Any previous invites to the payee by this Payor will be invalidated
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.description:
Update payee details for the given Payee Id.

Payors may only update the payee details if the payee has not yet onboarded
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Update Payee Remote Id
endpoints.description: Update the remote Id for the given Payee Id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYEEID}} with a real payeeid.

endpoints.name: Get Fundings for Payor
endpoints.description: Get a list of Fundings for a payor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get List of Payments
endpoints.description: Get payments for the given payor Id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payment
endpoints.description: Get the payment with the given id. This contains the payment history.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYMENTID}} with a real paymentid.

endpoints.name: Get Payout Statistics
endpoints.description: Get payout statistics for a payor.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payouts for Payor
endpoints.description: Get List of payouts for payor
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get Payments for Payout
endpoints.description: Get List of payments for Payout, allowing for RETURNED status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PAYOUTID}} with a real payoutid.

endpoints.name: Export Transactions
endpoints.description: Download a CSV file containing payments in a date range. Uses Transfer-Encoding - chunked to stream to the client. Date range is inclusive of both the start and end dates.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List Payment Changes
endpoints.description: Get a paginated response listing payment changes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{VELOPAYMENTS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your VELOPAYMENTS ACCESS TOKEN.
